hotel_name: Khách sạn Binh Duong Resident (Binh Duong Resident Hotel )

reviews.title: Worst Hotel on Earth
reviews.text: I am surprised why Agoda is referring such a filthy hotel. Never ever have it on your portal. Do remove it immediately else it will spoil Agoda’s name.
reviews.response:
Dear Sir / Madam
Firstly , I am deeply sorry for your bad experience but i think there's something wrong here . Accoding to your reservation , you booked a private suit room , but when you came to check in , you didn't like it . We always provide lots of photo of every rooms on Agoda . So , I think there's not reason for us to receive a bad review .
Besided , Binh Duong Hotel will always acquire your compliments/contributions to the hotel.
At the same time, Binh Duong Hotel would also like to thank you for trusting in choosing the hotel as your place to stay.
Have a good day .

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The floor was still wet when we arrived in the room even though it should have been clean. There was no key card provided and guests were asked to go up to the room for checking it by themselves, even though it should have been the staff's responsibility.

reviews.title: Room Problem
reviews.text: Facility in room spoil like aircon controler not working, tv not working, toilet smell and end up need to change room ...

reviews.title: Worst hotel ever!!!!
reviews.text: I originally booked a 4-day, 3-night stay at this hotel but left after just one night without requesting a refund or any room improvements. The hallway and my room had a strong mothball odor, which was unbearable. The bed was extremely hard, making it feel like I was sleeping on the floor. The pillows had a sweaty odor, and their filling was clumped and uneven. The bathroom layout was inconvenient, with the shower positioned next to the toilet, causing the entire floor to get soaked after every use. The walls were so thin that I could clearly hear loud conversations from the hallway. Even the room slippers had been previously used. Given these issues, I immediately booked another hotel and left without saying a word.

reviews.text:
This hotel’s photo is wrong !
It is not clean

reviews.title: budget
reviews.text: bed too hard,can't sleep.

reviews.title: Cleanliness need more improve
reviews.text:
The staff is good service and friendly, but the cleanliness Index really cannot accept. Pillow cover have watermark, bed cover lot yellow color mark, and lot bugs and spider webs. It's disgusting.

Bugs can refer the attachment.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Không sạch sẽ, hôi kiểu cũ mốc người hay dị ứng không nên thuê

reviews.title: The accommodation itself wasn't bad, but the response was disappointing.
reviews.text: It was a place I used for a half-night stay, and the size and location were not bad considering the price. However, when I checked out, I left some clothes in the closet and found out the next day. When I went back to inform them, they said it was gone and didn’t try to help me find it. I felt quite disappointed, as there should have been cleaning staff who could have checked.

reviews.title: Good for Value, other than that nothing special
reviews.text: Good for Value, location not bad. But in terms of cleanliness, comfortable and hospitality it is below average

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.text:
I had a disappointing experience during my stay. 
- The room was also infested with ants. I left my luggage for a night on the bed and it was full with ants inside by morning 
- The balcony couldn’t be closed (broken locker)
- there was ongoing construction throughout the hotel.
- The floor was dirty, with dust everywhere.
- There was no hot water when we came in, after playing with a water boiler we finally managed to make it hot .
- The room didn’t come with a remote for the AC, so I had to request one at the reception. When I got it, it didn’t work, so I had to go back to the reception. They replaced the batteries, and only then was I able to get the AC working. However, some functions still didn’t work (like adjusting the air direction to avoid direct airflow on the bed).
- The hotel advertises a rooftop with a view on both Agoda and Google Maps, but there was no such rooftop. 
- The WiFi was extremely slow, and I couldn’t load any pages, forcing me to use mobile data. 
- Finally, the bed sheets had stains and more ants, which was quite unpleasant.
reviews.response:
We are sorry for your bad experience during your stay at our hotel.
In fact, we are ready to support you with any problems you may have. So we really hope to be able to serve you better next time.
We are very sorry for this problem this time.

reviews.title: Value stay, a little distance from action
reviews.text:
Exceptional Value. 
Distance from activities challenging for people.
reviews.response: We sincerely apologize for your negative experiences during your stay. Hopefully next time we will be able to serve you again with better changes ^^

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The picture on Agoda is not trustworthy because it clearly said it would have windows, when i came in the room did not have window. So i had to pay extra to upgrade to a room with windows. The price even with the upgrade is still afordable but i didnt like the feeling of not having the info correct in the first place

reviews.title: The battle for cleanliness
reviews.text: Disadvantages: Took a photo of the passport with my phone during check-in. The building is overall old. There is a smell from the air conditioner, no soap, no tissues. It's not a card key, so it was difficult to open and close the door with a key. The balcony door doesn't lock. The area near the shower temperature control handle was very hot, causing skin pain for several days. There was a dead bug on the bed. The flip-flops are too big. There are stairs on the way to the elevator, and there’s a step in the middle of the hallway. The hallway is crowded like a lobby and less hot outside. I had to go to the lobby to receive deliveries from Grab. Advantages: All staff are friendly, the room is spacious, there is a table and sofa, and the price is cheap.

reviews.title: Good location, big room, cheap
reviews.text:
Booked this room just to stay while waiting for the late night flight. Location is just a few minutes walk to Han Market and Han River. The room is quite big (I expected a very small room for its price) and there was a lift. The down side that i noticed is that the mattress was quite hard (almost like sleeping on a wooden board) and there was a funky smell in the toilet.... smelled like a wet dog. But the usual amenities were there. The room I booked was the cheapest one, so it did not have any windows. The staff volunteered to book Grab for us, which we kindly declined as we are able to book on our own.

Overall, it's ok for its price but i would not stay for more than a night.

reviews.title: Best value accommodation.
reviews.text: It was neat, and while the location is slightly away from the tourist route, Grap is so vibrant that it wasn't a problem. The accommodation was spacious, which was really convenient. There were also no hygiene issues.
reviews.response: 우리는 귀하의 좋은 경험에 대해 기쁘게 생각합니다. 다음 번에도 여전히 당신의 선택이기를 바랍니다 ^^

reviews.title: The kindness of the reception.
reviews.text: This is my second time using it. It's a hotel with good cost-effectiveness, but if you prefer a cleaner environment, it might be better to spend a bit more on a tidier place. I'm focused on cost-effectiveness and had a good experience. An even better aspect was the kindness of the beautiful reception lady, which made my stay pleasant. She's very friendly~~ even with a free late check-out~~^^. I also received great help in checking bus information before moving to Laos. I plan to use it again next time.
reviews.response: 우리 호텔에 머무르는 동안 당신의 좋지 않은 경험에 대해 매우 유감스럽게 생각합니다. 그리고 당신의 긍정적인 피드백에 진심으로 감사드립니다. 다음에 또 만나요 ^^~~~~~~~~~~

reviews.title: Reasonably priced hotel.
reviews.text:
I stayed for two nights at around 40,000 won per night. Here’s my honest review. (Solo traveler)

1. It is located a bit away from the famous areas like Busan Barber, Kong Spa, and Gwangbokdong, which are about a 10-minute walk away, so it's not noisy.

2. However, the exterior shown in the main photos is quite different from reality. When I arrived, I wondered if the photos were edited, and while it might have been that the room I stayed in was particularly like that, the facilities are similar to a motel in Korea, with key usage, low water pressure, old air conditioning, poor soundproofing, and a hard bed.

3. The staff at the reception were friendly, and there is a 24-hour supermarket on the first floor, which was nice.

4. Conclusion: If you're looking for a budget-friendly place to stay briefly during a short trip, I somewhat recommend it; however, if you want a comfortable place to spend your time during a hot summer trip, it's better to look for at least a 4-star accommodation.
reviews.response:
Hello, Binh Duong Hotel would like to thank you for your compliments/contributions to the hotel.
At the same time, Binh Duong Hotel would also like to thank you for trusting in choosing the hotel as your place to stay.
Hope to see you again next time.
Have a good day .

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the central area, check-in is at 12 noon. Even though it was quiet, the staff still didn’t allow early check-in because it costs too much electricity. The room probably hasn't been used for months, so it's quite dusty. Otherwise, with a price of 2xx, there’s nothing to complain about.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: It's near the museum, there's still a used mineral water in the refrigerator. I was disappointed. But there's still room for improvement if they can train their people well. It's affordable and they have elevator. The internet is good as well as the airconditioning. If you like to experience an old way kind of room this is good.

reviews.title: Budget friendly
reviews.text: Good for backpackers looking for cheap but great value for money.
reviews.response: We sincerely apologize for your negative experiences during your stay. Hopefully next time we will be able to serve you again with better changes ^^

reviews.title: Check first
reviews.text: Convenient place.   It depends on each other. But location is goog for view(if you have.. )  frankly neutral for here.  Any problem then Agoda and Property are fast and way to wrong .  Especially your booking room.

reviews.title: Spacious, clean, and convenient surroundings.
reviews.text: The downside is that there is a parking fee, mainly at the hotel, so it can be quite expensive, and the cleanliness is not very thorough. Other than that, the receptionist is enthusiastic and charming.

reviews.title: Quick late night stay
reviews.text: Our flight did not arrive until 2 am. Hotel graciously checked us in very late around 3 am. Great location, nice staff, pretty clean although my wife found some hair in the sheets of her bed. Good AC. Tremendous value even though we were there just 6 hours

reviews.title: Cheap, cheerful and good location
reviews.text: Good location, cheap hotel, cleaning of the rooms could be better as we had to get our bedding changed when we first got in our room but over all it was a good stay and all you need for a few nights stay.
reviews.response: We sincerely apologize for your negative experiences during your stay. Hopefully next time we will be able to serve you again with better changes ^^

reviews.title: It has good cost performance.
reviews.text: You can stay here at a good cost-performance ratio. There aren't any major inconveniences when using Grab, but if you plan to visit Ganjang Market and Yong Bridge on foot, the location is a bit awkward, making it difficult. However, I used it for a good cost-performance ratio, and the reception is always available, allowing for 24-hour check-in. The late check-out fee is also relatively cheap. For my trip, the accommodation was only for sleeping, and it was really a great value for just that purpose.
reviews.response: 당신이 체류 중에 좋은 경험을 했다니 우리는 매우 기쁩니다. 앞으로도 우리가 다낭에 갈 때 당신의 선택으로 남아 있기를 바랍니다 ^^

reviews.title: Khách sạn đầy đủ cơ bản
reviews.text: Khách sạn nằm ở vị trí đẹp, nhưng một số đồ trong ksan chưa sạch lắm. Cơ bản thì tạm được
reviews.response: Dạ Bình Dương chân thành xin lỗi về những trải nghiệm chưa tốt của mình ạ. Bên em sẽ cố gắng khắc phục những sai sót. Cảm ơn chị vì đã lựa chọn Bình Dương ạ <3

reviews.title: Outstanding value for money
reviews.text: I made a reservation after reading mixed reviews on Google, but I went in without expecting cleanliness for a price of about 12,000 won per night, and it turned out to be in excellent condition beyond my thoughts. (I had the mindset that as long as the bedding is clean, it’s fine, but some people seem to expect a condition of 4 stars or higher without considering the price...) However, there is a minibar, amenities, and a hairdryer. The air conditioning is cool, and the warm shower works well. Normally, for this price, room cleaning is often skipped, but they do it every day. However, the downside is that soundproofing is not very good. Guests may have to be lucky, right? (I happened to have one night where a local was noisy from drinking until dawn, haha. If there are many Chinese guests, you might have to consider it quite a bit~) There’s a 24-hour convenience store right next door. There are quite a few restaurants within a 5-10 minute walk (behind the hotel block, toward the city hall, and toward the Han market). Above all, the reception is very very kind~~!!! I plan to stay again next time. I recommend it~!!
reviews.response: Hello, thank you for trusting and booking a room at our hotel. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

reviews.title: The receptionist is extremely cute.
reviews.text: This hotel is worth staying at, the bathroom is clean, the room is tidy. The staff is lovely, there's a TV but we couldn't turn it on. The air conditioner remote doesn't work. The water in the sink for washing face is very weak. But the location is great and the price is excellent. I will come back and recommend it to everyone when they come to Da Nang. Thanks.
reviews.response:
Hello, thank you for trusting and booking a room at our hotel. 
I sincerely apologize for the above problems. We will try to fix it for the better. Hope we will welcome you again!! Thank you very much!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: clean room, fully equipped with amenities, the receptionist is super cute, located right in the city center

reviews.title: Value-for-money hotel
reviews.text:
From the 4th to the 8th, a total of 4 nights.  
Superior Twin Ocean View Room 1413 (4th floor)  
The room is not large but clean. The ocean view from the room is wonderful. You can also enjoy the sunrise in the morning. It is disappointing that there are no chairs and tables on the balcony.  
For reference, the Deluxe Ocean View Room is located on the 2nd floor. The room is slightly larger and has a tea table and chairs on the balcony, but it is connected to the next room, which is not ideal, so I chose the Superior Room.  
Each bed in the twin room is small. A man who is about 175 cm tall and weighs 73 kg fits almost perfectly when lying down. If you toss and turn while sleeping, be careful of falling off.  
The mirror does not face the dresser below the TV but faces the bathroom door as a full-length mirror. The wardrobe where you can hang clothes is in the bathroom, which feels a bit unusual. The partition of the shower booth is somewhat short, causing a lot of water to splash inside the bathroom. The water pressure is good, and there is no unpleasant smell at all. The toilet paper holder is uncomfortably positioned next to the toilet.  
The breakfast restaurant, Pearl Zone on the 1st floor, is enormous. In contrast, the breakfast display area is modest. The menu does not meet the expectations of a 5-star quality in terms of variety and quality. However, compared to the one-night rate, it can be considered reasonable.  
The pool is the biggest factor that enhances the hotel's rating. The exotic landscape and the spaciousness of the pool allow you to fully enjoy the vacation atmosphere. One disappointment is that despite having a private beach, it is not properly organized. There are only 5 beach beds, making it look very empty. If you walk along the beach for about 10 minutes, you can reach the main zone of An Bang Beach.  
There is a shopping area established in the basement between the hotel main building and the pool, but only one supermarket is operating there. However, even this place shows significant differences in price and display compared to the supermarket located on the ground floor where the reception is. You can use the supermarket on the ground floor, which is not expensive at all. Beer 333 330ml is 19,000 VND (about 1,000 won).  
The distance to Old Town is about 5 km. If using Grab, the car costs about 90,000 VND (about 5,000 won) and the motorbike about 35,000 VND (about 2,000 won).  
Within a 10-minute walk from the hotel, you can find cafes, spas, restaurants, motorbike rentals, and currency exchange.

reviews.title: Good Overall
reviews.text: Good location and clean

reviews.title: Great value and spacious room
reviews.text: It was a pleasant stay! the room was spacious and the bed was comfortable. I have used the laundry service and it was quick and affordable. I recommand this hotel.

reviews.title: It's great for a 0.5 night stay.
reviews.text: I didn't realize it when I entered the hallway, but when I got into the room, I was surprised at how spacious it was. I went for a half-night stay, and it was cleaner and larger than I expected, which was great. However, when I woke up the next day, there was something like a bug at my feet, so I felt disgusted. Overall, I was satisfied with the stay.
reviews.response: We are happy to know that you had a great experience during your stay. Hope we will still be your choice when coming to Da Nang in the future ^^

reviews.title: Trip in Da Nang
reviews.text: Everything is great, nice room design, the staff is supportive and friendly. The place located behind the city’s library and some government offices. It’s peaceful and safety. Besides that, there are a lot of convenience stores, local restaurants and coffee shops around in just 5 mins walk.
reviews.response: We are glad that you had a good experience during your stay at our hotel~~~~. We hope we will continue to serve you the next time you visit Da Nang ^^

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Got a room with balcony view at best price. It was clean and big. Also the staff was helpful and we were able to do early checkin
reviews.response: Hello, thank you for trusting and booking a room at our hotel. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

The room is tidy, beautifully designed, quite luxurious, fully equipped, strong wifi, but the water pressure is a bit weak.  
The location is quiet, not far from the dining and entertainment area.  
The staff is very enthusiastic.
reviews.response: Chào anh , Bình Dương Hotel xin ghi nhận những lời khen / đóng góp của anh cho khách sạn . Đồng thời Bình Dương cũng xin gửi lời cảm ơn vì anh đã tin tưởng chọn khách sạn làm nơi dừng chân . Hy vọng sẽ được gặp lại anh vào những lần tiếp theo , chúc anh một ngày tốt lành .

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Satisfaction
reviews.text: I booked a single room, but the hotel was fully booked, so they upgraded me to a double room. As a result, I had a spacious room to stay in. The hotel is not very new, but has a modern style, and they clean the room every day, so it is quite clean and comfortable.
reviews.response: Hello, thank you for trusting and booking a room at our hotel. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

reviews.title: The hotel is acceptable, within the price range.
reviews.text: I booked a trial one-night stay in Da Nang and found this hotel quite acceptable. The bedding and bathroom are clean. However, I noticed the water pressure is quite low and the TV is broken and not watchable. On the bright side, the hotel staff is very enthusiastic.
reviews.response: Xin chào, cảm ơn chị đã tin tưởng và đặt phòng tại khách sạn bên em. Những vấn đề trên bên em sẽ cố gắng sửa chữa để có được dịch vụ tốt hơn. Hy vọng bên em sẽ chào đón chị một lần nữa!! Cảm ơn chị rất nhiều ạ !!

reviews.title: The hotel has a good location and enthusiastic staff.
reviews.text: Even though I stayed one night and had an air conditioning malfunction that required me to change rooms, the staff were supportive and enthusiastic.
reviews.response: Thank you for trusting us to book a room at our hotel. Hope we will see you again!!

reviews.text:
Recommended for single males  
Not recommended for single females  

The location near the river is good.  
(It is quiet because it's away from the busy area)  
Is it about a 15-minute walk to Han Market?  

However, since it is a newly opened place,  
there were quite a few unsatisfactory aspects, but I think this will be resolved over time.  

The staff were very friendly!  
It seems suitable for those looking for a cost-effective accommodation just to sleep.

reviews.text: great
The room is very big and nice. The staff are accommodating and responsive. Vy, Chau, and Kim are very kind. Thank you so much!

It's really worth it, everyone, don't hesitate to book. Right in the center, close to the beach, just a short drive away. Although the window doesn't look exactly like in the pictures, the room is still spacious and airy. The hotel isn't brand new, but it's clean for 100k, and the staff is super supportive, even the third party renting motorbikes from the hotel is very worth it 🫶🏻 The only complaint is the full-length mirror from Shopee is distorted in the room =)))

reviews.title: Clean and Worth Experiencing Hotel
reviews.text: Friendly and enthusiastic reception. The location is close to the center where the fireworks are held, with spacious rooms near the famous tourist market. Close to Han River Bridge and the famous Dragon Bridge, I will invite everyone to stay again next time.
reviews.response: Chào anh , Bình Dương Hotel xin ghi nhận những lời khen / đóng góp của anh cho khách sạn . Đồng thời Bình Dương cũng xin gửi lời cảm ơn vì anh đã tin tưởng chọn khách sạn làm nơi dừng chân . Hy vọng sẽ được gặp lại anh vào những lần tiếp theo , chúc anh một ngày tốt lành .

reviews.title: Chambre spacieuse et confortable
reviews.text: Chambre vraiment agréable et idéalement placée, proche de petits cafés et restaurants. Nous n’avons pas testé le spa et le restaurant. Mais le personnel était agréable et disponible.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe 1 Bedroom Suite Lodge East Campus

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: 価格相応でした。写真に期待してしまい予約しましたが、写真と事実が大きく異なります。スタッフは最低限の対応ですが特に問題はないです。私の部屋は窓がない部屋で（そもそもそんな部屋があるとも思わず予約しました）、湿気を感じ、シャワーは少し経つと水になります。安さ重視と荷物を置ける目的なら使いやすいのかもしれません。私も間にホイアンに行くため、スーツケースをこのホテルに置いて一泊分の身軽さでミーソン遺跡とホイアンに行きました。家族で行くホテルではないので、途中で別のホテルを予約し移動しました。
reviews.response: We sincerely apologize for your negative experiences during your stay. Hopefully next time we will be able to serve you again with better changes ^^

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: 長期滞在するならば、静かで滞在しやすいと思います。
reviews.response: ご休暇中のご休息に当ホテルをお選びいただき、誠にありがとうございます。次回のご来館を心よりお待ちしております。またビンズオンホテルにお越しの際は、ぜひお越しください。良い一日をお過ごしください。<3

reviews.title: お湯が出ない（深夜便前のシャワー利用）
reviews.text:
深夜便だったのでシャワー目的で利用しましたが、お湯が出ませんでした。

予約サイトに載っている写真とは程遠く、古いくて暗くじめっとしている、日本でいう民泊くらいのレベル感です。

水がやや寒かったですが、この価格で深夜便までのシャワーを浴びれるのはとてもありがたかったです。

シャンプーはついてますが、持参した方が良いかもです！
reviews.response: 不快な経験をされたことを心よりお詫び申し上げます。あなたが言ったことを修正するよう努めます

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: これ以上無いコスパ最強ホテルです。こんな広くてベランダ付き、設備の整った部屋でこの料金は素晴らしい！スタッフの方も愛想良かったし、観光もしやすい立地でした。ダナンに行く時はまた泊まりたい。

reviews.title: ห้องเหม็นบุหรี่มาก
reviews.text: ห้องเหม็นบุหรี่มาก
reviews.response: We sincerely apologize for your negative experiences during your stay. Hopefully next time we will be able to serve you again with better changes ^^

reviews.title: คุ้มค่ากับราคา
reviews.text: ห้องเก่า กำแพงบาง แต่ก็คุ้มกับราคาที่จ่ายไป
reviews.response: Hello, thank you for trusting and booking a room at our hotel. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

reviews.text: ทำเลดีราคาโอเค

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good
reviews.response: Hello, thank you for trusting and booking a room at our hotel. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 價錢實惠，峴港少數安靜的住宿點，房間灰塵要注意清潔
reviews.response: 對於您的負面體驗，我們深表歉意。希望下次仍然是您的選擇

reviews.title: 物美價廉
reviews.text: 高CP值

reviews.title: 절대가지마요
reviews.text:
침대에 벌레있고. 화장실은 그냥 여인숙 화장실입니다. 
냄새 오지고 공항가기전 몇시간 있으려 싼거 빌리려다 몇분만에 나왔어요.
돈 버리고 다시 근처 호텔 잡고 쉬고 갔네요.
절대! 절대! 싸다고 가지마세요

reviews.title: 추천하지 않아요.
reviews.text: When I arrived at the hotel, I tried to check in at the reception, but the staff was talking on the phone. I've never seen anyone hand over the keys while talking on the phone. When I entered the room, there were a lot of ants in the blanket. The balcony is equipped with an outdoor unit, so it's best not to use it. It's dust and hot air. Above all, the mattress I was using was as hard as concrete, so it was hard to sleep well. I don't understand why it's getting a good reputation. It seemed like a neglected hotel with no care at all. The staff's attitude, cleaning, mattresses, everything was not good. It's different from the picture.

reviews.title: 진짜 사진 사기
reviews.text:
이 방을***원에
침대가 나무에 이불 깔아놓은 수준
진짜 낡은 건물
왜 안팔리는지 이해가되는
차라리 도미토리가 나을듯

reviews.title: 내 인생 최악의 호텔
reviews.text:
침대밑에는 쓰레기 굴러다녀.
침대 커버 이불은 노랗게 변색이오.
매트리스는 돌침대요.
바퀴벌레 모기 개미는 기본이요.
정말 짐조차 두기 싫고 샤워조차 하기싫었던
인생 최악의 호텔.

reviews.title: 위생상태 불량..
reviews.text: 들어가자마자 90년대 여인숙에 온 느낌이 확 들었습니다.. 침구는 얼룩져있고.. 모기 10마리와 싸우느라 잠을 못잤습니다..

reviews.title: 청결 최악
reviews.text: 새벽에 도착해서 씻고 몇시간 잘려고 들린곳인데 수건도 더럽고 침대시트에 머리카락과 얼룩이 엄청 많았고 죽은 바퀴벌레도 있었습니다 아무리 싼금액이지만 수건이라도 깨끗했음 씻었을텐데 너무 더러워서 옷도안갈아입고 씻지도 않고 아침까지 버텼네요 최악입니다

reviews.title: 음.. 그냥 짐보관용으로 가능한정도
reviews.text:
나이드신 이모들과 여행을 하면서 0.5박 개념으로 예약했어요.
비행비 시간이 많이 남아 그 시간동안 좀 누워서 쉬려고했는데 방에서 냄새가 장난이 아닙니다
화장실 냄새. 꿉꿉한 냄새 도저히 방에 있을수 없을정도에요

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
내평생 냄새나고 더러운 호텔은 처음봄
침대시트도 남이 사용한그대로 였음
3박4일 예약했지만 새벽시간에 도착한터라
간신히 하루밤 보내고  짐챙겨서 나와서 윙크아이콘 호텔로 옮김
reviews.response: We sincerely apologize for your negative experiences during your stay. Hopefully next time we will be able to serve you again with better changes ^^

reviews.title: 넓으면 뭐하나..
reviews.text: 낡은 욕실. 욕실 타월은 제대로 세탁된건지 이상한 냄새남. 침구도 오래되어 눅눅하고 누렇고.. 에어컨 소리는 왜이렇게 큰지.. 추워서 끄려는데 전원도 안꺼지고 온도를 높이니 쾌쾌한 냄새 나는 것 같고..  에어컨 소음과 온도 때문에 잠을 제대로 못잠. 2박 예약한걸 후회. 결국 예정보다 빠른 체크아웃

reviews.title: 변기에서 쥐가 나오는 호텔
reviews.text: 화장실 변기 뚜껑을 여니까 생쥐가 있었습니다. 벌레 나오는 호텔은 여러번 보았지만 쥐는 처음 입니다. TV도 나오지도 않고 에어컨도 가스가 없는지 미지근한 바람만 나옵니다. 침대 매트리스도 얼마나 딱딱한지 맨 바닥에 이불하나 깔아 놓은것과 별 차이가 없네요. 전반적으로 불만족합니다.
reviews.response: Hello, I'm sorry for giving you an unpleasant experience while staying at our hotel. We will absorb and change to be more perfect. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

reviews.title: 가성비 호텔이지만 위치가 도심과 멉니다
reviews.text: 위치가 도심과멀고 주변 식당 및 마트없음

reviews.title: 최악의 직원응대가 실망스럽다
reviews.text:
다낭박물관장이 지인이어서 한국에서 다낭을 거쳐 달랏의 집으로 가는 길에 그를 만날 겸 박물관 바로 앞의 허름한 이 호텔을 예약했다.
10월 15일 오후 3시 반 쯤 호텔에 도착했을 때, 유리문 너머로 젊은 여자가 소파에 누워 있다가 양 손에 큰 캐리어를 끌고 접근하는 나를 보곤 문도 열어주지 않은 채 카운터로 빠르게 이동하는 것을 보았다. 호텔 직원이었다.
아마도 나 때문에 휴식을 방해 받아 짜증이 났는지 60살 가까운 나에게 이 어린 여자애는 매우 무례한 말투와 태도를 보였다.
빈정거리는 표정과 말투는 그녀가 심지어 매우 짧은 단문밖에 구사하지 못하는 초급 단계의 영어임에도 충분히 느낄 수 있었다.

(나) hi.
- are you one?
(나) yeah, I'm alone.
- do you know? your room is for three. but you are one.
(나) I know, I like wide and big room.

그리고 그녀는 짧은 고지사항을 빠르게 말하곤,

- do you understand?
(나) yes I do. where is elevator?

이때 그녀는 귀찮다는 듯 한 쪽으로 손을 흔들며 가리켰고 황당한 나는 아무 말도 더 하고 싶지 않아 묵묵히 엘리베이터에 올랐다.
베트남에선 초급영어 수준의 젊은 여자애들이 종종 동양계 외국인들을 무시하는 말투를 보이는 것을 가끔 보는데 이 여자애처럼 노골적으로 무례한 경우는 난생 처음이다.
더 이해하기 어려운 것은, 이런 무례를 경험한 것은 나 뿐이 아닐텐데 이 호텔 오너는 어째서 저렇게 황당한 어린 여자애로 하여금 손님들을 상대하게 하는가.
호텔방의 컨디션도 5층임에도 개미들이 많고 청소 상태도 실망스럽다.
다만 다음날 본 다른 여직원은 친절했고 저 이상한 여자애보다 훨씬 영어구사 능력도 나았다.
세계의 수많은 나라들을 여행했고 수백 곳의 호텔을 경험했지만 이번처럼 어이 없고 황당한 직원응대를 경험한 것은 처음이다.
만약 이 후기를 호텔 주인이 접한다면, 반드시 해당 일자와 시간의 cctv를 확인하시라.
참고로 나는 미국 출생으로 박사과정까지 마친 뒤 한국으로 간 재미교포로 아시아와 유럽의 대학에서 강의를 하면서 현재 베트남 달랏에 집을 짓고 수 년 째 살고 있는 사람이다.

reviews.title: 0.5박
reviews.text:
그냥 잠시쉬엇다가는 모텔수준.
잠 안자고 밤비행기 타실분들 이면그냥저냥
저렴하니까 방에 창이없어서그런지 냄새남 화장실 하수구냄새
reviews.response: I'm sorry for giving you an unpleasant experience while staying at our hotel. We will absorb and change to be more perfect. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

reviews.title: 가성비 고려해도 추천하지 않습니다.
reviews.text:
새벽 비행기때문에 잠깐 머물렀는데, 잠시라도 버티기 힘들 정도로 냄새가 났습니다.
그래서 근처 공원과 카페에서 시간을 보내다가 퇴실했습니다.
다른 호텔은 창문이 없어도 환기시설이 잘 되어있는데, 이곳은 그렇지 않습니다.
reviews.response: We sincerely apologize for your negative experiences during your stay. Hopefully next time we will be able to serve you again with better changes ^^

reviews.title: 그냥 싼맛에..
reviews.text: 비행기 시간에 애매해서 4시간 정도 쉬다 가려고 예약을 했는데.. 청소상태가 너무 안좋네요 방음은 아예 안되는지 도로 바이크소리 자동차소리 너무 크게 들리네요.. 그냥 싼맛에 잠시 머물다 가는게 아니라면 비추
reviews.response: Hello, I'm sorry for giving you an unpleasant experience while staying at our hotel. We will absorb and change to be more perfect. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

reviews.title: 그냥 그냥 저냥한 호텔
reviews.text: 다른거는 다 ㅅㅌㅊ입니다만, 접객이 좀 많이 안좋아요. 물론 이 가격에는 나쁘진 않지만, 기본적으로 접객은 보통 호텔보다 조금 안좋습니다
reviews.response: Hello, I'm sorry for giving you an unpleasant experience while staying at our hotel. We will absorb and change to be more perfect. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

reviews.title: 0.5박 짐놓기좋음
reviews.text:
첫날2층 0.5박
마지막날6층 0.5박
2층방은침대2개 
6층방은큰침대1개
6층이더 좋아요 앞에 테라스랑 방 창문열면 환기매우잘됨 만원에 나쁘지않음~ 잠깐있다갈거라 괜찮은데 방금청소한방을 배정해줬는데 바닥안말라있고 바닥걸레냄새가 좀 역겨움....어차피 씻고만나갈곳이긴함ㅠㅠ 방크기가 작지않아 답답하진않음 티비가안나옴ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.response:
Dear Sir / Madam
Firstly , I am deeply sorry for your bad experience.
Besided , Binh Duong Hotel will always acquire your compliments/contributions to the hotel.
At the same time, Binh Duong Hotel would also like to thank you for trusting in choosing the hotel as your place to stay.
Have a good day .

reviews.title: 가격대비 무난
reviews.text: 늦은 비행기 시간이라 잠깐 쉬었다 갈 정도의 저려미 숙소 찾았는데 가격대비 나쁘지 않아요
reviews.response: Hello, thank you for trusting and booking a room at our hotel. Hope we will welcome you one more time!! Thank you very much

reviews.title: 벌레
reviews.text: 직원은 친절하나 숙소내 청소상태가 아쉬우며, 바퀴벌레가 여러마리 나와서 벌레에 민감한 사람은 비추천

reviews.title: 방크고 좋아요.
reviews.text: 에어컨 15분기다리면 시원해지고.방크고좋아요.딱 0.5박숙소로 적합.침구냄새나고 바닥은 신발신고다녀야돼요.청소만빼면 잠만자고오기엔 괜찮아요
reviews.response: Hello, sorry for giving you an uncomfortable experience while staying at our hotel. Thank you for your feedback so we can improve in the future. Thank you for trusting us to book a room at our hotel. Hope we will see you again!!

reviews.title: 가성비 있습니다
reviews.text: 저는 마지막날 샤워하고 짐 정리하기 위한 용도로 예약했습니다 다만 화장실에서 냄새가 나고 침대는 푹신하지 않아서 숙박은 어려울듯합니다

reviews.title: 직원은 좋으나, 방 상태가 진짜..
reviews.text:
정말 많은 곳 이용해 봤지만, 여기가 제일 최악입니다.

문 열기도 전에 문 쪽에 바퀴벌레가 붙어 있어서 기겁 하고 들어갔는데, 바닥에 바퀴벌레 다 기어다니고.. 진짜 너무해도 너무합니다.

그냥 짐 맡기고 샤워만 하고 나올 생각으로 갔는데, 찝찝해서 짐만 맡겼다가 바로 나와서 다른 곳 갔습니다. 숙박은 상상도 하지마세요.

reviews.title: 가격대비 좋아요
reviews.text: 딱 가격만큼합니다 저렴함에 큰기대없다면 괜찮은 숙소입니다 청소는 좀 많이 아쉬웠습니딘

reviews.title: 직원분들 친절합니다
reviews.text:
사진에 살짝 속았지만,
싸게 잡으려고 했던거라 ㅎㅎ
짐만 두고 씻고 잠깐 있다가 공항갔어요.돈 좀 더 추가해서 좋은 방으로 잡으시면 좋을듯!
reviews.response: 귀하의 부정적인 경험에 대해 진심으로 사과드립니다. 다음 번에는 더 나은 서비스를 제공할 수 있기를 바랍니다.

reviews.title: 마지막날 공항가기전 쉬는장소로 좋아요!
reviews.text:
마지막날 공항시간이 애매할 경우 저렴하게 숙소 예약한다음 이용하기 좋아요!

다만 한시장과 롯데마트 등에서 조금 떨어진곳에 있어 저라면 조금이라도 돈을 더주고 한시장쪽으로 옮길것같습니다! ㅎㅎ

직원분들은 정말 친절하세요!

reviews.title: 애매한 반나절 스케줄 이용하기에 괜찮은 숙소
reviews.text: 숙박용으로는 큰 기대를 하지 않는것이 좋습니다. 에어컨은 작동하나 오래되어 쾌쾌합니다. 온수는 나오나 뜨겁지는 않습니다. 객실에 수건이 없습니다. 카드키가 작동하지 않아 로비에 3번 내려가서 도움을 받았습니다. 객실 사용중 정전이 되어 모든 전기가 나갔습니다. 청소 상태는 좋습니다. 바닥이 깨끗하고  침구류의 위생상태도 냄새가 나지 않으며 좋습니다. 숙박을 하기엔 좀 부담되지만 잠시 머물다 가기에는 가격 대비 좋습니다.
reviews.response: Binh Duong Hotel은 귀하의 의견에 감사드립니다. 가까운 시일 내에 다시 만날 기회가 있기를 바랍니다. 좋은 하루 보내시기 바랍니다

reviews.title: dơ
reviews.text:
Trải nghiệm quá kinh khủng và bức xúc. Phòng thì bẩn, lại còn có gián bò trong phòng – một vấn đề vệ sinh cực kỳ nghiêm trọng mà không thể chấp nhận được ở bất kỳ khách sạn nào.

Nhưng điều khiến mình sốc nhất là cách nhân viên xử lý. Khi mình báo với lễ tân, câu trả lời mình nhận được là: “Em làm lễ tân có liên quan gì đến em đâu, em không biết.” Thật sự không thể tin nổi một câu trả lời vô trách nhiệm và thiếu chuyên nghiệp đến như vậy. Lễ tân là người đại diện cho khách sạn mà lại phủi bỏ trách nhiệm trắng trợn, không xin lỗi, không hỗ trợ, không giải quyết.

Cách phục vụ như vậy cho thấy khách sạn hoàn toàn không tôn trọng khách hàng. Vừa mất vệ sinh, vừa thái độ tệ hại, đây là trải nghiệm tồi tệ nhất mình từng gặp.

Mình chắc chắn sẽ không bao giờ quay lại và khuyên mọi người nên tránh xa nếu không muốn rước bực vào người.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng dơ, toilet còn tóc rải rác và đồ dùng của khách trước. Nv thái độ tệ.

reviews.title: Chỗ ở tệ nhất mình từng đặt
reviews.text:
1.	Lễ tân làm việc cực kỳ thiếu chuyên nghiệp. Khi tôi đến nhận phòng (đã đặt trước), lễ tân vẫn đang ăn uống ngay tại quầy. Mất gần 15 phút để đưa chìa khoá và thẻ phòng, nhưng lại đưa sai chìa, thẻ thì không hoạt động. Tôi phải xuống đổi lại. Tổng cộng mất gần 30 phút mới vào được phòng.
	2.	Khách sạn xuống cấp nghiêm trọng. Cảm giác không khác gì nhà hoang. Khi vào phòng thì cửa mở toang, phòng dơ bẩn, rèm thì rách nát, mùi ẩm mốc rất nặng. Hoàn toàn không giống mô tả hay hình ảnh trên ứng dụng.
	3.	Khi tôi quyết định không ở và yêu cầu hoàn tiền, lễ tân chỉ ậm ừ cho qua và nói quản lý sẽ liên hệ vào hôm sau. Nhưng chờ mãi không ai liên hệ. Khi tôi chủ động nhắn lại thì phía khách sạn lại đổ trách nhiệm sang Agoda, nói rằng app sẽ hoàn tiền chứ họ không giải quyết.

Tóm lại, đây là trải nghiệm tệ nhất mà tôi từng có khi đặt khách sạn. Không khuyến khích ai lựa chọn nơi này.

Phòng thì bí, k có cửa sổ, như 1 cái kho v, vẫn tạo thành phòng để kinh doanh. 
Hành lang khách sạn cũng bí bách. 
Phòng k sạch cho lắm.
Giá thành cũng cao. Sau khi nâng phòng lên thành phòng có ban công, đang nghỉ ngơi thì phát hiện phòng có nhiều gián, gọi điện nhân viên xử lí thì nhân viên chỉ báo xử lí bằng bình xịt gián,  nhưng mk có ý kiến thì ks đổi cho lên phòng khác, phòng điều hoà chạy yếu, chưa đc vệ sinh trc khi đổi phòng cho khách, nên hơi bụi. Phải ở tạm, trong tâm thế k vui vẻ gì.

reviews.text: Først da vi kom fikk vi et dårlig rom hvor senga var hard, aircondition funket ikke og lufta var så dårlig så fikk byttet til et annet rom og der var det over forventet bra, stort rom med utsikt over hele byen og meget sentralt til mange fasiliteter. Anbefaler på det sterkeste dette stedet om du vil bo sentralt og få valuta for pengene 😉 topp betjening, veldig behjelpelig med alt du måtte trenge. Keep up the good work. Kommer definitivt tilbake neste gang 😁😁😁

reviews.title: Not Bad For That Price
reviews.text:
I had reserved a room with a balcony. However, when I arrived at the hotel, they gave me a room without even a window. I then spoke to reception and reported the situation, and they gave me a better room than the one I had originally reserved.

The room and bathroom were generally nice. The furnishings didn't look old. There were two balconies. However, there was no minibar or kettle in the room. When I mentioned that there was no kettle in the room, they said they didn't have kettles and that if I wanted hot water, I could get it from the water dispenser at the reception.

The biggest problem was that the room had not been thoroughly cleaned. It looked clean from a distance, but when you looked closely, you could see that it wasn't very clean. The surroundings were generally dusty. Also, the two balconies were not clean at all. Unfortunately, I saw the same lack of care in the reception area.

The hotel's internet was also not very good. As a freelancer, I constantly have meetings, and during these meetings, the connection kept dropping, forcing me to use my phone's internet.

If you want to stay on the river side, I can say the location is truly excellent. There are many cafes and restaurants nearby. Also, since it's on a side street off the river, you can get to the riverbank in a minute whenever you want. 

Finally, although the receptionists were generally very friendly, their English wasn't very good, and we sometimes had trouble communicating.

reviews.title: 清潔衛生很糟
reviews.text:
床很髒，棉被掀開超多頭髮、體毛！
有清潔嗎？陽台還有別人吃過不知放幾天的食物！超噁心！唯一是櫃檯服務還可以！
不會再去！

reviews.response:
Thank you for your feedback and suggestions! We’re glad to hear that you found the value of our hotel satisfactory and appreciate your overall experience.

Regarding the points you mentioned about the building structure and signage, we will carefully review and work on improving these details to make navigation easier for our guests. Additionally, we have noted your comments about the amenities provided in the room and the soundproofing, and we will take steps to enhance these aspects.

We look forward to welcoming you again in the future and hope your next stay will be even more enjoyable. Thank you once again for staying with us!
